content_body: Gary and Lissa – What a wonderful experience! First of all, we were all impressed with HOW CLEAN everything was! The fact that everything is supplied for you is awesome, but then, once you get into bed…THAT took the cake! No pictures online could describe how beautiful and peaceful this home is. I was here with four of my closest couple friends and it’s like this place brought us closer together! My friends and I will surely be back and for those who come after us – we leave nothing but positive vibes. Thank you, Gary, for having such a wonderful getaway. We will never forget this time.
title: Blue Ridge Luxury Cabin Experience
